summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of EduManage. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests PASS (auth, batches, students, attendance, fees, expenses, dashboard, PDF reports, user isolation, protected-endpoint auth). Frontend: login → dashboard (4 stat cards render correctly) → batches create → batch detail (student add, mark present, save attendance) → finance expenses (add expense) → reports (PDF download triggers + 'PDF downloaded' toast) → logout. All critical user flows verified working.

minor.issue: Pydantic EmailStr rejects RFC-reserved TLDs like '.test' with 422; cosmetic — only affects test fixtures using fake TLDs, not real users. Could add a docs note.

issues: Initial 'Loading...' state shows centered without skeleton; cosmetic — replaced quickly once /api/dashboard/stats resolves

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~680 lines and contains all routers/models/endpoints/PDF helpers — consider splitting into modules (auth.py, routers/batches.py, routers/fees.py, services/pdf.py) once feature set grows.
CORSMiddleware is added AFTER include_router; in FastAPI this still works because middleware is registered globally, but ordering is unusual. Consider adding middleware before mounting routers.

/api/expenses (GET) uses MongoDB $regex on the 'date' field for month filtering (e.g., '^2026-06') — works since dates are stored as ISO YYYY-MM-DD strings but is unindexable for that pattern. Acceptable at current scale; for scale, store a separate 'month' field.
/api/auth/logout does not require auth (no Depends(get_current_user)) — safe (just clears cookie) but logically inconsistent with the rest of the API.
Cookie is set with SameSite=None; Secure — correct for cross-site SPA; ensure FRONTEND_URL stays HTTPS in production.
ObjectId(batch_id) calls would raise bson.errors.InvalidId (500) on malformed input — wrap with try/except to return 404.
seed_data_creation: Tests created and cleaned up TEST_*/UI_Test_* batches, students, expenses. A secondary test user (test_user_*@edumanage-example.com) is registered for isolation testing and left in DB (intentional — used across runs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_edumanage_backend.py covers full API surface (20 tests). Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Frontend Playwright flow verified via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Stat-card testids are stat-students/stat-attendance/stat-fees/stat-expenses. PDF report download testids: att-report-download, fee-report-download, exp-report-download. Use real-looking email domain (e.g. *.com) for register fixtures — Pydantic EmailStr rejects .test/.example/.local.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs to RCA. The single test fixture failure (422 on @edumanage.test) was a test-side mistake — Pydantic's EmailStr uses email-validator which forbids reserved TLDs (RFC 2606). Fixed by switching to @edumanage-example.com.
